name: ABC Harness Metrics
short_description: Adds Ma2024 AgentBoard discrete-subgoal progress rate and Li2024 Embodied Agent Interface six-plus-one error taxonomy to the ABC harness used by t0023.

entry_points.name: compute_progress_rate
entry_points.description: Ma2024 AgentBoard discrete-subgoal-coverage progress rate for one trajectory.

entry_points.name: classify_error
entry_points.description: Li2024 Embodied Agent Interface error-taxonomy classifier; returns one of seven labels (six error labels plus an ok sentinel).

entry_points.name: score_trajectory
entry_points.description: High-level entry point that composes progress rate and per-step error classification into a TrajectoryScore.

entry_points.name: TrajectoryScore
entry_points.description: Frozen dataclass with task_success, progress_rate, step_errors tuple, and error_distribution Counter.

entry_points.name: ErrorTaxonomyLabel
entry_points.description: StrEnum of the seven error-taxonomy labels (hallucination, affordance, missing_step, extra_step, wrong_order, precondition_or_effect, ok).

entry_points.name: make_judge_call
entry_points.description: Construct a judge callable backed by the local Claude Code CLI with cost-tracking and budget cap.

entry_points.name: CostTracker
entry_points.description: Process-wide cumulative-spend tracker with cap enforcement.
